'''ât-r-y-f''' ('''kataryefoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:jamb|jamb]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| t-r-y-f
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:jamb|jamb]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| ât-r-y-f
|-
! Lemma
| kataryefoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thitaryefoko|thitaryefoko]] || [[word:jitaryefoko|jitaryefoko]] || [[word:shitaryefoko|shitaryefoko]] || [[word:kitaryefoko|kitaryefoko]]
|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|}
